meaning: n.生产量,生产能力,吞吐量
examples: On-line liquid chromatography-mass spectrometry is a high throughput method for the analysis of small molecules in biofluids.
This is good for message throughput.
What are your system's throughput requirements?
These products are also designed to optimize production yields, improve throughput, and reduce production costs.
China Merchant's container throughput increased over 20% in the first four months of the year.
